svg.text: Edge Devices → Regional Databases ←→ VPC Peering ←→ Grafana (AMG) → Engineering Teams
Amazon Managed Grafana (AMG) — Grafana IS the Access Layer
Engineers log in via AWS SSO · RBAC per team · No intermediate API · No custom code
VPC config on AMG → private subnets → resolves Aurora hostnames over VPC Peering · Row-level security via SSO group → Aurora session context
grafana provider manages all data sources as Terraform resources · sg-db: port 5432 from 10.0.0.0/16 only
No ECS · No ALB · No custom API · No application code to maintain
Deployment: terraform apply · terraform.tfvars per environment · make deploy-all (regional → dr → central)
grafana provider + aws provider in single apply · data sources created alongside VPC Peering
DR / FAILOVER — us-east-1 · 10.5.0.0/16 · SAME AWS account
Grafana · AWS SSO · sees authorised regions only
SSO group → session context → Aurora RLS
Grafana · AWS SSO · sees authorised regions only
Reviews events · monitors device fleet health
SSO group → session context → Aurora RLS
Grafana · AWS SSO · sees authorised regions only
SSO group → session context → Aurora RLS
EU · US · CA · APAC have no network path between them. Data stays in origin region. Grafana queries in-place over VPC Peering.
